summary: Completed src/lib directory reorganization (R-3) across 8 phases. Moved 36 files into 7 domain-specific subdirectories with barrel exports, updated all import paths, and verified each phase with tsc/lint/test:unit.

phases.name: db/ group
phases.description: Moved db.ts, db-instance.ts, db-migrations.ts, db-path-resolver.ts, db-repository.ts, db-migration-path.ts to src/lib/db/ with barrel export and compatibility shims at old paths.

phases.name: tmux/ group
phases.description: Moved 10 tmux files + 3 transport files (from src/lib/transports/) to src/lib/tmux/. Eliminated transports/ directory entirely.

phases.name: security/ group
phases.description: Moved auth.ts, ip-restriction.ts, path-validator.ts, env-sanitizer.ts, sanitize.ts, worktree-path-validator.ts to src/lib/security/ with named exports barrel.

phases.name: detection/ group
phases.description: Moved status-detector.ts, prompt-detector.ts, cli-patterns.ts, prompt-key.ts to src/lib/detection/.

phases.name: session/ group
phases.description: Moved claude-session.ts, cli-session.ts, worktree-status-helper.ts, claude-executor.ts to src/lib/session/. session-cleanup.ts kept at root (Facade). Handled getSessionName collision with alias.

phases.name: polling/ group
phases.description: Moved response-poller.ts, auto-yes-manager.ts, auto-yes-resolver.ts to src/lib/polling/.

phases.name: git/ group
phases.description: Moved git-utils.ts, worktrees.ts, clone-manager.ts to src/lib/git/.

phases.name: docs update
phases.description: Updated CLAUDE.md, module-reference.md, architecture.md module paths. Fixed auth.ts import for CLI build compatibility.

keyDecisions: Used compatibility shims (re-export files at old paths) for db/ group to minimize consumer changes
Merged transports/ directory into tmux/ group (eliminated separate directory)
Used named exports (not export *) for security/ barrel to control public API surface
Handled getSessionName collision between claude-session.ts and cli-session.ts with alias in barrel
Kept session-cleanup.ts at lib root as Facade pattern (orchestrates across multiple groups)
Used relative import in auth.ts for config/auth-config to maintain CLI build compatibility (tsconfig.cli.json has no @ alias)
